claims.statement: the checkout button submits the order and shows a confirmation
the search box lets a signed-in customer read another customer's orders
not_established: Never reproduced against a running API, so this finding is reported unproven rather than dropped.

security_findings.summary: The order search box may accept an unvalidated customer id.
security_findings.reason: no reproducer was captured; the finding stays in the security section and is not demoted

not_established: Never reproduced against a running API, so this finding is reported unproven rather than dropped.

criteria.criterion: the confirmation renders after a real click
criteria.evidence: clicked the button in Chrome, captured the confirmation screenshot
